title: stichorkis geelvinkensis
intro: Stichorkis geelvinkensis is a species of orchid native to the Geelvink Bay in Papua, Indonesia. It is a terrestrial orchid known for its unique flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, Stichorkis geelvinkensis is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
